articles.title: Zimbabwe's iconic stone birds were taken by colonialists. Finally, they're all back home
articles.description: For centuries the prized sculptures, central to national identity, have been kept outside Zimbabwe's borders.

articles.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
articles.description: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

articles.title: Zimbabwe play challenges proposed constitutional changes
articles.description: Bodo is a one-man performance that draws on Ngano, a traditional Shona storytelling method, blending it with modern visual and audio elements to create an immersive experience. Through this fusion of tradition and contemporary theatre, Guzha seeks not only to entertain but to provoke reflection

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: IMF warns South Africa of recession
more.description: JOHANNESBURG – The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has warned that the global economy faces recession if the conflict in the Middle East continues—with energy-importing countries like South Africa at even greater risk. In a report published last week, IMF economists warned that a longer or broader conflict could significantly weaken growth and destabilise financial markets. more.title: Arteta says Arsenal ‘more convinced’ about winning title despite loss to Man City
more.description: MANCHESTER, England — Arsenal’s players are “more convinced” than ever that they can win the Premier League despite losing to title rival Manchester City on Sunday, manager Mikel Arteta said. The 2-1 defeat at Etihad Stadium was a second straight loss in the league for Arsenal and the fourth in its last six games in […]The post Arteta says Arsenal ‘more convinced’ about winning title despite loss to Man City appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: How Bayern Munich won its 13th Bundesliga title in 14 years
more.description: BERLIN — Bayern Munich wrapped up another Bundesliga title on Sunday, the club’s 13th in 14 years, after a record-breaking season that could still get better. more.title: Oil prices jump and stocks are mixed as the US-Iran standoff keeps the Strait of Hormuz in limbo
more.description: Oil prices climbed more than 5% while world shares were mixed Monday as a standoff between Iran and the U.S. prevented tankers from using the Strait of Hormuz. The Persian Gulf waterway was closed again after Iran reversed a decision to reopen the strait and President Donald Trump said a U.S. Navy blockade of Iranian […]The post Oil prices jump and stocks are mixed as the US-Iran standoff keeps the Strait of Hormuz in limbo appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.
